text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. My first habit is drinking a glass of water, followed by a 20-minute yoga session. After a quick shower, I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and coffee. My work schedule starts at 9 a.m., and I usually take a short break for lunch around noon. I finish work at 5 p.m. and head to the gym for a 30-minute workout, which helps me stay fit and relax. In the evening, I cook dinner, read for about an hour, and watch a TV show before bed. I’m always in bed by 10:30 p.m. This routine keeps my life consistent and balanced.
